$comment: Single source of truth for white-label branding. Edit these values and rebuild (docker compose up -d --build, or npm run dev) — the whole app (names, logo, colours, emails, org domains) reconfigures itself. This file is consumed by BOTH the frontend and the backend.

company.name: Sapphire Broking
company.description: Self-hosted enterprise file management platform by Sapphire Broking.

logo.$comment: Paths are served from the frontend /public directory. Drop your files there and point these at them, or use an absolute https URL.

colors.$comment: Brand primary in light and dark themes (hex). Everything themed off --primary follows these.

org.$comment: Your own email domains. Shares to any other domain are flagged 'external' and audited.

mail.$comment: Default From header for outgoing share emails.
